Vidya Diagnostic Centre is an ultra- modern fully automatic Diagnostic Centre started by Dr. Vidyagauri Lele in 1995. The Clinic is equipped with state of the art Autoanalyzers, Digital X-ray Machine by Meditronics & Agfa CR-10 X Processor , Ultra-sonography machine by Mindray and a single touch 12 lead ECG machine by……. She started Centre in the year 1995. She holds Ph. D. degree in Chemistry and an experience of 38 yrs in the field.
